graphql-webclient/src/main/java/com/exam.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket creation from the deprecated HttpClient API to the dedicated WebSocketClient API introduced in newer Vert.x versions.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Replace high-level repository abstractions with direct Vert.x SQL client usage to simplify the data initialization logic.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.human_impl: Removed imports for PostRepository, CommentRepository, AuthorRepository and replaced them with io.vertx.sqlclient.Pool and Tuple.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Update DataLoaderRegistry registration to use the beforeExecute callback pattern required by newer GraphQL Java versions.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Update the exception handler method signature to return a CompletableFuture as required by the newer GraphQL Java API.
Rename the handler method from onException to handleException to match the updated interface contract.
Wrap the synchronous result in a completed CompletableFuture to satisfy the new async return type.
Update the call to the default handler to use the new method name handleException.
Add the missing import for CompletableFuture required by the new return type.
Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<List<Post>> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<List<Post>>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<Post> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<Post>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<UUID> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<UUID>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vertx-specific DataFetcher wrapper with standard GraphQL DataFetcher returning CompletionStage.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Changed return type from VertxDataFetcher<UUID> to DataFetcher<CompletionStage<UUID>> and updated implementation.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Replace Vert.x-specific DataLoader wrappers with standard Dataloader library interfaces to decouple from Vert.x specific implementations.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Replaced VertxBatchLoader and VertxMappedBatchLoader with BatchLoaderWithContext and MappedBatchLoaderWithContext.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Adopt CompletionStage as the return type for batch loaders to align with modern asynchronous Java standards.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Added .toCompletionStage() to the return values of the load methods.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Switch to DataLoaderFactory for creating DataLoader instances to support the new loader interfaces.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.human_impl: Replaced DataLoader.newDataLoader and DataLoader.newMappedDataLoader with DataLoaderFactory.newDataLoader and DataLoaderFactory.newMappedDataLoader.
